FROM SHORT CAUSE TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUL-21-2011 IN DEPT. 525 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL - NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT JERRY THOMAS; THE COURT DISMISSES THE APEAL AND AFFIRMS THE JUDGMENT RENDERED BELOW FOR $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL AND $125.00 IN COSTS IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT DONALD SMITH AND AGAINST APPELLANT JERRY THOMAS. SEE SCAND JUDGMENT DATED JUL-21-2011. JUDGE: HON. LINDA H. COLFAX; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).
